componentSpecs.name: LeaveManagementService
componentSpecs.description: Implements the ILeaveManagementService interface. Provides the applyForLeave method that validates leave policy, checks balance, creates a leave request in DRAFT status, transitions it to SUBMITTED, and logs an audit record, all within a single database transaction. Other methods (approveLeave, rejectLeave, cancelLeave, getLeaveBalance) throw NotImplementedError as placeholders for future phases.
